9. Notes

  • Correlation heatmaps show Pearson r values.
  • Significance stars, when present, use BH-adjusted p-values:
    • * adjusted p < 0.05
    • ** adjusted p < 0.01
    • *** adjusted p < 0.001
  • Missing optional plots/tables usually mean that the corresponding optional input was not provided, or that the module was skipped.
